description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and a global before_script that echoes the $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE variable. Add an alpine-docker job that uses the alpine Docker image, runs ./setup.sh, and belongs to the build stage. Add a centos-docker job that uses the centos image, runs ./setup.sh, and belongs to the build stage. Add debian-docker and ubuntu-docker jobs that use the debian and ubuntu images respectively, each executing ./setup.sh in the build stage, with no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
